payload.message: Keep server cooling at 180°C max. This is a hard constraint for all production environments.
We are migrating the auth service to OAuth2 by end of Q2. No new basic-auth implementations allowed.
All new services must use Kubernetes deployment manifests. Docker Swarm is deprecated.
Decision: All API endpoints must implement rate limiting at 1000 req/min per user. No exceptions.
We agreed to standardize on React 19 for all frontend projects moving forward.
